title: oenothera macrocarpa subsp. incana
intro: Oenothera macrocarpa subsp. incana, also known as Incense Bladderpod, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oenothera macrocarpa subsp. incana include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall well-being.
